generated_oml:
instance ResearchLaboratoryEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Research laboratory environment hosting the gantry crane system"
    base:contains PhysicalCrane, CraneController
]

instance PhysicalCrane : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical gantry crane system in the laboratory"
]

instance CraneController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Controller for the physical gantry crane"
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Python program connecting to crane controllers to collect operational data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalCraneInterface
]

instance TimescaleDBData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Operational metrics stored in TimescaleDB database"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBLoggingEnabler
]

instance InfluxDBData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data managed by InfluxDB for crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDBEnabler
]

instance PreRecordedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Prerecorded operational data from virtual machine images"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance AdaptiveControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model for adaptive control of physical greenhouse and digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo OptimalControlEnabler
]

instance ActiveMQMessageBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ActiveMQ message broker for data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance TimescaleDBLoggingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB database for storing crane operational data"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance InfluxDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "InfluxDB database for time-series data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for simulation using prerecorded data"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance GitHubVersionControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Version control using GitHub for digital twin code"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance ContainerizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization for code dissemination using Docker"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance OptimalControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for optimal control of the physical crane using behavioral models"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance PredictionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for prediction capabilities using simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictionService
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for logging historical operational metrics of the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataAccess
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time data visualization of gantry crane system monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides RuntimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for optimal control of the physical crane"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustCraneControlParameters
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for continuous validation of digital twin against physical system"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationResult
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for simulation of gantry crane system behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationCapabilityInsight
]

instance PredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for predicting indoor air quality for virus spread prevention"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictionCapabilityInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataAccess : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Access to historical operational metrics for analysis"
]

instance RuntimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Runtime visualization of system data for indoor air quality management"
]

instance AdjustCraneControlParameters : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of crane control parameters for optimal operation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ValidationResult : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation results comparing digital twin and physical system"
]

instance SimulationCapabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation capability for virus spread prevention context"
]

instance PredictionCapabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Prediction capability for indoor air quality management"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the Control Application (Python) are transmitted via the Physical Crane Interface to the Physical Crane, utilizing trajectories produced by the Trajectory Generator Service. Specific command formats, validation, authentication, feedback systems, and execution confirmation details are not provided in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system employs an ad-hoc architecture using the C4 Model for visualization with context and container diagrams. Components include InfluxDB for data storage, ActiveMQ message broker for inter-component communication, and Microsoft Azure tools for digital twin pipeline implementation in the Air Quality Management exemplar."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Services communicate via MQTT broker for signaling. TimescaleDB is used for data storage and Grafana for dashboard visualization. Network topology, bandwidth requirements, latency specifications, reliability mechanisms, and security protocols are not detailed in the document."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "AutomationML is used as an interoperability standard in the Air Quality Management exemplar. ActiveMQ message broker facilitates data exchange in GreenhouseDT, while Microsoft Azure tools support the digital twin pipeline. Specific data exchange protocols and integration patterns with external systems are not detailed."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system implements AutomationML as an industry standard for digital twin modeling, as utilized in the Air Quality Management exemplar. No other specific standards, compliance frameworks, or interoperability specifications are detailed in the provided documents."
]
